entities.name: ReferenceData
entities.description: Stores reference/lookup data used throughout the application, supporting hierarchical structures and temporal validity

entities.name: User
entities.description: User entity representing system users with authentication, authorization, and organizational information

entities.name: Application
entities.description: Core entity representing SNAP enrollment applications with complete lifecycle management including data entry, validation, workflow processing, and reviewer assignment

entities.name: SNAPEnrollmentData
entities.description: Physical data model for SNAP enrollment and issuance data tracking, including validation, calculation, and review workflow status

entities.name: WorkflowProcess
entities.description: Defines workflow processes with their states, transitions, and business rules for application processing

entities.name: WorkflowInstance
entities.description: Represents an active instance of a workflow process with current state tracking and assignment information

entities.name: BusinessRule
entities.description: Entity that defines business rules, validation logic, and constraints that govern data processing and workflow behavior within the system

entities.name: FieldValidation
entities.description: Stores validation rules and configuration for entity fields, supporting data entry validation and form field management

entities.name: CalculationRule
entities.description: Stores calculation rules and formulas used for computing derived values in various entities, including SNAP enrollment rate calculations

entities.name: AssignmentRule
entities.description: Defines rules for automatically assigning workflow instances to specific users or roles based on various criteria such as entity type, state, jurisdiction, and priority level

entities.name: Document
entities.description: Physical data model for document management system storing file metadata and content information

entities.name: Audit
entities.description: Tracks all system changes and user actions for compliance and debugging purposes

entities.name: Notification
entities.description: Entity to manage system notifications for users including delivery tracking and action requirements

entities.name: Report
entities.description: Entity for managing report definitions including data sources, parameters, scheduling, and distribution settings

entities.name: SystemConfiguration
entities.description: Stores system configuration settings with support for different environments, data types, and security features

entities.name: DataValidation
entities.description: Entity to track validation results for application data fields against business rules, including error details and resolution information

entities.name: Contact
entities.description: Stores contact information for various entities in the system, supporting multiple contact types and methods

entities.name: Integration
entities.description: Stores configuration and status information for external system integrations and data synchronization processes
